steps.instruction: Imagine sharing 3 sandwiches equally among 4 friends.
steps.explanation: Each person gets some portion of the sandwiches.

steps.instruction: The division 3 ÷ 4 can be written as the fraction 3/4.
steps.explanation: The dividend (3) becomes the numerator, the divisor (4) becomes the denominator.

steps.instruction: Check: if each person gets 3/4, do all 4 shares add up to 3?
steps.explanation: Yes, 4 people each getting 3/4 uses up all 3 sandwiches.
Each person gets 2 whole pizzas and 1/3 of another.
The answer checks out: 3 shares of 2 1/3 equals 7.
